  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "PEX tubing is routed through a concrete slab without protective sleeving",
    "Lack of protection against abrasion from concrete expansion and contraction",
    "Potential chemical reaction/corrosion risk between concrete and unprotected pipe"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Expose the PEX tubing at the slab penetration point",
    "Install a protective sleeve or wrapping around the PEX tubing where it passes through the concrete",
    "Ensure the sleeve extends at least 1 inch above the finished floor level"
  ],
  "rationale": "PEX tubing passing through concrete slabs must be sleeved or wrapped to protect the pipe from abrasion caused by thermal expansion/contraction and to prevent chemical degradation from the concrete. Running PEX unsleeved through a slab violates both the International Plumbing Code (IPC) and manufacturer installation specifications.",
  "references": [
    "IPC Section 305.3 (Pipes through foundation walls)",
    "IPC Section 305.5 (Protection against physical damage)",
    "PEX Manufacturer Installation Guidelines"
  ]
}
